ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "cf_id" INTEGER /* Crowdfunding ID associated with the project */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Contact ID of the project creator */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company or creator behind the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Financial goal of the project */,
  "pledged" INTEGER /* Total pledged amount */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the project (e.g., successful, failed, canceled) */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is launched */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the project */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "staff_pick" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is a staff pick */,
  "spotlight" INTEGER /* Indicates if the project is highlighted as a spotlight project */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* Category ID of the project */,
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Subcategory ID of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, suspended, completed) */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL for the project page on the platform */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL for the project thumbnail image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL for a promotional video */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of links to the project's social media profiles */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags for better searchability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the contact */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the contact */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category that this subcategory belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding goal */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project ID */,
  "target_amount" INTEGER /* Target amount for the funding goal */,
  "current_amount" INTEGER /* Current amount raised towards the goal */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for reaching the funding goal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding goal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the funding goal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project being backed */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact who is backing the project */,
  "pledged_amount" INTEGER /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "pledged_date" TEXT /* Date when the amount was pledged */,
  "reward_tier" INTEGER /* ID of the reward tier the backer is supporting */,
  "reward_description" TEXT /* Description of the reward the backer will receive */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the update is related to */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was posted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the update was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user's role */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user's email is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backing project */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_fee" INTEGER /* Fee charged for the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
